details.note: INV-002 cartography complete. Mapped 5 fixed gaps (ENV_BLOCKLIST, sanitizedProcessEnv fix, sidecar env sanitization, cross-spawn filtering, OPENCODE_AUTH_CONTENT blocklisted) and 7 remaining gaps (2 critical: no output scrubber, bash tool env leak; 3 high: OPENCODE_AUTH_CONTENT bypass, other tool spawns unfiltered; 2 medium; 2 low). Documented 6 existing narrow scrubbers and 5 bash security gaps. 7 auth token exposure points cataloged across workspace.ts, auth/index.ts, account.ts, enterprise/storage.ts, and tool spawns.
